name: zos-copilot-assistant
description: Interact with z/OS mainframes directly from GitHub Copilot Chat — manage datasets, jobs, JCL submission via Zowe SDK.

chatParticipants.name: zos
chatParticipants.description: Interact with z/OS via Zowe: datasets, jobs, JCL submission, TSO, USS

commands.name: ds
commands.description: Datasets & PDS members: list, read, write, search, delete, download, upload

commands.name: jobs
commands.description: z/OS Jobs: status, spool output, history, cancel, purge

commands.name: run
commands.description: Submit JCL from a dataset, inline, or resubmit a previous job

commands.name: tso
commands.description: Execute TSO or z/OS console commands

commands.name: uss
commands.description: Browse and manipulate the USS filesystem

commands.name: lpar
commands.description: List, switch and manage z/OS partitions (LPAR profiles)

languageModelTools.name: zos_listDatasets
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List z/OS datasets matching a pattern. Returns dataset names with attributes (DSORG, RECFM, LRECL, volume).

pattern.description: Dataset name pattern (e.g. HLQ.COBOL.** or HLQ.*.SRC)

languageModelTools.name: zos_listMembers
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List all members in a z/OS PDS dataset with modification dates and user IDs.

dataset.description: Fully qualified PDS dataset name (e.g. HLQ.COBOL.SRC)

languageModelTools.name: zos_readMember
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Read the content of a PDS member. Use this to examine COBOL source code, JCL, copybooks, or any z/OS dataset member.

languageModelTools.name: zos_datasetInfo
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get detailed attributes of a z/OS dataset: DSORG, RECFM, LRECL, BLKSIZE, volume, SMS classes, creation and reference dates.

languageModelTools.name: zos_searchContent
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Search for text across all members of a PDS dataset. Returns matching lines with member names and line numbers. Useful for finding COBOL paragraphs, copybook usage, or specific code patterns.

memberPattern.description: Optional member name pattern to restrict search scope

languageModelTools.name: zos_listJobs
languageModelTools.modelDescription: List z/OS jobs filtered by owner, name prefix, or status (ACTIVE, OUTPUT, INPUT). Returns job name, ID, owner, status, and return code.

prefix.description: Job name prefix with optional wildcard (e.g. PAYROLL*)

languageModelTools.name: zos_getJobStatus
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Get detailed status of a z/OS job including return code, class, subsystem, and list of spool files with sizes.

jobName.description: Job name — uses most recent match if multiple exist

languageModelTools.name: zos_getJobOutput
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Retrieve spool output from a z/OS job. Can filter by DD name (JESMSGLG, JESJCL, SYSPRINT, SYSOUT). Without a filter, returns the most important spool files automatically.

ddName.description: Specific DD name to retrieve (e.g. SYSPRINT, JESMSGLG, SYSOUT)

languageModelTools.name: zos_uploadFileToPds
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Upload a local file to a z/OS PDS member. The file content replaces the target member. Use for uploading COBOL source, JCL, copybooks, etc.

localPath.description: Local file path to upload (absolute or relative to workspace)

languageModelTools.name: zos_uploadDirToPds
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Upload all files from a local directory to a z/OS PDS. Each file becomes a member (name truncated to 8 chars, extension stripped).

localPath.description: Local directory path (absolute or relative to workspace)

languageModelTools.name: zos_copyMember
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Copy a PDS member to another dataset or member name on z/OS. Can be used to rename a member within the same PDS or duplicate it to another PDS.

replace.description: Overwrite target if it already exists (default false)

languageModelTools.name: zos_copyDataset
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Copy an entire z/OS dataset to another dataset. For PDS, copies all members one by one. For sequential datasets, performs a single copy call.

replace.description: Overwrite existing members/content in target (default false)

languageModelTools.name: zos_createDataset
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Create a new z/OS dataset. Two modes: (1) type preset — use dstype (PARTITIONED, SEQUENTIAL, CLASSIC, BINARY, C) with optional attribute overrides; (2) allocate like — use likeDataset to copy attributes from an existing dataset. Attribute defaults from VS Code settings (zosAssistant.createDefaults.*). dstype and likeDataset are mutually exclusive.

name.description: Fully qualified dataset name to create (e.g. HLQ.COBOL.SRC)

dstype.description: Dataset type preset. Mutually exclusive with likeDataset.

likeDataset.description: Allocate like an existing dataset — copies all its attributes. Mutually exclusive with dstype.

recfm.description: Record format: FB, VB, F, V, U, FBA, VBA (PARTITIONED/SEQUENTIAL only; overrides setting default)

dirblk.description: Directory blocks for PDS (overrides setting default)

alcunit.description: Space allocation unit: TRK or CYL (overrides setting default)

volser.description: Volume serial (overrides setting default; empty = SMS-managed)

languageModelTools.name: zos_deleteMember
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Permanently delete a member from a z/OS PDS dataset. This operation is irreversible — always confirm with the user before invoking.

dataset.description: Fully qualified PDS dataset name (e.g. HLQ.COBOL.SRC)

languageModelTools.name: zos_deleteDataset
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Permanently delete an entire z/OS dataset (PDS or sequential). This operation is irreversible — always confirm with the user before invoking. For non-SMS datasets provide the volume serial.

dataset.description: Fully qualified dataset name to delete

volume.description: Volume serial where the dataset resides (required for non-SMS-managed datasets)

languageModelTools.name: zos_downloadMember
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Download a single PDS member from z/OS to the local workspace. The file is saved under downloads/<DATASET>/<MEMBER>.txt.

targetDir.description: Optional local directory path (relative to workspace or absolute). Defaults to workspace/downloads.

languageModelTools.name: zos_downloadAllMembers
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Download all members of a z/OS PDS dataset to a local directory. Files are saved under downloads/<DATASET>/.

dataset.description: Fully qualified PDS dataset name (e.g. HLQ.COBOL.SRC)

targetDir.description: Optional local directory path (relative to workspace or absolute). Defaults to workspace/downloads.

languageModelTools.name: zos_downloadAllDatasets
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Download all z/OS datasets matching a pattern to a local directory. First lists the datasets then bulk-downloads them.

pattern.description: Dataset name pattern (e.g. HLQ.COBOL.** or HLQ.*.SRC)

targetDir.description: Optional local directory path (relative to workspace or absolute). Defaults to workspace/downloads.

languageModelTools.name: zos_submitLocalJcl
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Submit a local JCL file to z/OS for execution. Reads the file from the local workspace, submits it via the z/OSMF internal reader, and returns the assigned job ID. Requires user confirmation before execution.

localPath.description: Local path to the JCL file (absolute or relative to workspace, e.g. downloads/HLQ/JCL/CNTL/BATCH01.jcl)

monitor.description: If true, monitor the job until completion (not performed by this tool — use zos_getJobStatus for polling)

languageModelTools.name: zos_submitJcl
languageModelTools.modelDescription: Submit JCL from a dataset member for execution on z/OS. Returns the assigned job ID for tracking. Requires user confirmation before execution.

member.description: Member name containing the JCL (for PDS datasets)

zosAssistant.defaultProfile.description: Default Zowe profile name (leave empty to use Zowe Explorer's active profile)

zosAssistant.confirmDangerousOperations.description: Require confirmation for dangerous operations (delete, cancel, purge)

zosAssistant.protectedDatasetPatterns.description: Dataset name patterns considered as production (wildcards supported)

zosAssistant.monitorTimeoutSeconds.description: Maximum wait time in seconds for job monitoring

zosAssistant.monitorPollIntervalSeconds.description: Polling interval in seconds for job monitoring

zosAssistant.maxSpoolLines.description: Maximum spool lines to display inline (longer files are truncated)

zosAssistant.telemetryEnabled.description: Enable local usage telemetry (data stays on your machine)

zosAssistant.createDefaults.alcunit.description: Default space allocation unit for dataset creation (TRK = tracks, CYL = cylinders)

zosAssistant.createDefaults.primary.description: Default primary space allocation for dataset creation

zosAssistant.createDefaults.secondary.description: Default secondary space allocation for dataset creation

zosAssistant.createDefaults.recfm.description: Default record format for dataset creation (PARTITIONED and SEQUENTIAL types only)

zosAssistant.createDefaults.lrecl.description: Default logical record length for dataset creation

zosAssistant.createDefaults.blksize.description: Default block size for dataset creation (0 = let z/OS determine)

zosAssistant.createDefaults.dirblkPds.description: Default number of directory blocks for PDS dataset creation

zosAssistant.createDefaults.volser.description: Default volume serial for dataset creation (empty = SMS-managed)

zosAssistant.createDefaults.storclass.description: Default SMS storage class for dataset creation

zosAssistant.createDefaults.mgntclass.description: Default SMS management class for dataset creation

zosAssistant.createDefaults.dataclass.description: Default SMS data class for dataset creation

scripts.vsix:pre: npm run package && npm run vsix
